issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases in its instructions.
Installation script uses curl piped to bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Write fuzz and fork tests for an ERC-4626 vault
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used Foundry-native patterns (testFuzz_ prefix with bound(), vm.createSelectFork, vm.startPrank/stopPrank, makeAddr, forge-std Test import) per the SKILL; baseline wrote Hardhat-style or generic Solidity tests without the cheatcodes.

scenarios.name: Set up reproducible deployment script and CLI interactions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used forge script with vm.startBroadcast/vm.envUint plus cast call/cast send for interactions and forge snapshot for gas regression as documented; baseline used a JavaScript deploy script without scripted broadcast or cast follow-up.
